competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Cursor 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

May 2026:
Cursor 3.5 (May 20) - Cloud Agents: agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, report results back to IDE asynchronously.

Cursor 3.3 (May 7) - Build in Parallel subagents, pinned-skill pills, Composer 2.5 with multi-file refactor at file-tree scale, native Jira integration.

April 2026:
Cursor 3.2 (April 24) - /multitask: agent execution runtime spawns async subagents in parallel rather than serializing.

June 2026:
Enterprise: manage multiple teams from one place with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls. Generally available.

Canvas Design Mode: Select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits. 'Design Mode is now available in canvases. Select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits, just as you would in the browser. Instead of describing the change in text, you can point to it, provide feedback, and iterate more quickly.'

Shared canvases: can now be opened full-screen in browser. Agents can embed buttons in canvases that run a specific prompt when clicked. Canvas sharing: 'share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser.' Available on Pro, Teams, Enterprise.

Teams usage: new Premium seat for heavy agent users; split usage pools; real-time visibility and alerts.
competitors.content_hash:
Cursor 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

May 2026:
Cursor 3.5 (May 20) - Cloud Agents: agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal

changes.description: Cloud Agents (3.5, 5月20日)：在隔离云端 VM 跨多个 repo 并行运行，异步返回结果到 IDE
changes.evidence: 「Cloud Agents — agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 作为独立 fast session 在云端自主运行，向 meee2「人=慢 session / AI=快 session」模型直接趋近

changes.description: Canvas Design Mode（6月）+ agent 内嵌按钮：直接指向 UI 元素指导 AI 编辑，agent 可在 shared canvas 中嵌入可执行按钮
changes.evidence: 「Select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits, just as you would in the browser. Instead of describing the change in text, you can point to it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive-first 编辑——指向元素而非文字描述，与 meee2 descriptive canvas 概念高度重叠

changes.description: /multitask (3.2) 和 parallel subagents (3.3)：同时跨 repo / 环境并行运行多个 agent session
changes.evidence: 「/multitask, a feature that lets Cursor's agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：并行 AI 快 session 管理，IDE 被重构为「agent execution runtime」

changes.description: 企业级多 team 管控（6月 GA）：不同安全策略、预算、功能控制统一管理
changes.evidence: 「Enterprise customers can now manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for each」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：企业统一管理多个 AI session team，向组织级 session 治理延伸

key_findings: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents (5月)：AI agent 在云端隔离 VM 中跨 repo 并行工作，IDE 被重构为「agent execution runtime」
Canvas Design Mode (6月)：直接指向 UI 元素指导 AI 编辑，agent 可在 shared canvas 中嵌入可执行按钮
Cursor 定位从「AI 代码编辑器」快速转向「agent 协调平台」，多处触碰 meee2 核心抽象

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
competitors.raw_snapshot:
OpenAI 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 22, 2026 - Workspace Agents in ChatGPT:
Teams can create shared agents that handle complex tasks and long-running workflows, operating within the permissions and controls set by their organization. Powered by Codex. 'Run in the cloud, so they can keep working even when you're not.' Handle preparing reports, writing code, responding to messages. Audit trails and zero-trust permissioning baked in from day one. Available: ChatGPT Business, Enterprise, Edu plans. Free until May 6, then credit-based pricing.

Canvas deprecation: Canvas being discontinued in GPT-5.5 Instant and GPT-5.5 Thinking. Writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks.

Projects update: Teams users now support up to 40 uploaded files (previously 20).
competitors.content_hash:
OpenAI 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 22, 2026 - Workspace Agents in ChatGPT:
Teams can create shared agents that handle complex t

changes.description: Workspace Agents（4月22日）：企业团队共享的云端 AI agent，处理长期复杂任务，用户离线时持续工作
changes.evidence: 「shared agents that handle complex tasks and long-running workflows, all while operating within the permissions and controls set by their organization... run in the cloud, so they can keep working even when you're not」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：组织级共享 AI 快 session，在人（慢 session）不在线时继续工作，权限治理内嵌。这是 meee2 人+AI session 同协议概念在 ChatGPT 产品层的直接实现

changes.description: Canvas 在 GPT-5.5 中废弃，功能内嵌为 chat 中的 writing / code blocks
changes.evidence: 「Canvas is being discontinued in GPT-5.5 Instant and GPT-5.5 Thinking, with writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks」

key_findings: Workspace Agents (4月22日)：企业团队共享的 Codex 驱动 AI agent，云端持续运行、用户不在线时继续工作——这是 OpenAI 对「AI 快 session」的直接产品化
Canvas 在新模型中废弃：OpenAI 转向将 artifact 编辑内嵌进 chat，而非独立 canvas 界面

competitors.name: Windsurf / Devin Desktop
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Windsurf→Devin Desktop via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

June 2, 2026 - Windsurf rebranded to Devin Desktop:
Cognition acquired Codeium/Windsurf (OpenAI $3B offer fell through after July 2025 exclusivity expired; Google DeepMind $2.4B deal followed; Cognition stepped in with IP + brand + ~250 engineers). Rebrand pushed as OTA update, no re-download needed.

Key changes:
- Devin Local replaces Cascade (30% more token efficient, subagents, Rust rewrite). Cascade deprecated July 1, 2026.
- Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, multi-agent management) is now the primary UI. Manages BOTH local Devin sessions AND cloud Devin sessions in one unified Kanban dashboard.
- Strategic repositioning: 'Cognition is turning Devin Desktop into a fleet manager for AI agents that also happens to contain a code editor.'

ACP (Agent Client Protocol):
'ACP is an open protocol (Apache 2.0, JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout) that standardizes communication between editors and coding agents — the LSP equivalent for AI agents. ACP has been adopted by JetBrains, Google, GitHub, and 25+ agents.' At launch: Devin Desktop runs Claude Agent, Codex, OpenCode, and any ACP-compatible agent natively.
competitors.content_hash:
Windsurf→Devin Desktop via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

June 2, 2026 - Windsurf rebranded to Devin Desktop:
Cognition acquired Codeium/Windsurf (OpenAI $3B

changes.description: 被 Cognition 收购，6月2日更名 Devin Desktop，定位从「AI 代码编辑器」转为「AI agent fleet manager」
changes.evidence: 「Cognition is turning Devin Desktop into a fleet manager for AI agents that also happens to contain a code editor」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Agent Command Center 以 Kanban 视图统一管理本地 + 云端 AI session，IDE 降为 agent 编排平台的一个子视图

changes.description: ACP (Agent Client Protocol)：开放协议标准化 editor 与 coding agent 通信，JetBrains / Google / GitHub 及 25+ agent 已采用
changes.evidence: 「ACP is an open protocol (Apache 2.0, JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout) that standardizes communication between editors and coding agents — the LSP equivalent for AI agents. ACP has been adopted by JetBrains, Google, GitHub, and 25+ agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：这是「人+AI 同一协议」在 coding 领域的开放标准实现。ACP 若成为行业标准，meee2 的「session 同构」概念在 coding 域面临被 commoditize 的风险

changes.description: Devin Local 替代 Cascade（Rust 重写，30% token 效率提升，原生 subagents 支持），Cascade 7月1日废弃
changes.evidence: 「Devin Local replaces Cascade (30% more token efficient, with subagents, and a Rust rewrite) — Cascade is deprecated July 1」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：subagents 支持强化了 AI 快 session 的并发执行能力

key_findings: 6月2日更名 Devin Desktop：Cognition 完成收购，产品定位从 IDE 转为「AI agent fleet manager」，Agent Command Center 为主界面
ACP 开放协议：「agent 的 LSP」，JetBrains / Google / GitHub 均已采用，25+ agent 支持——meee2 锚点 #1（人+AI 同协议）在 coding 域被标准化

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Claude.ai/Anthropic 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 17, 2026 - Claude Design (Anthropic Labs, research preview):
Powered by Claude Opus 4.7. Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise. Create visual designs/prototypes/slides/one-pagers through conversation, inline comments, direct edits, custom sliders made by Claude. Start from text prompt, images, documents (DOCX/PPTX/XLSX), codebase, or web capture tool. Team sharing: private / org-link view / edit access with group chat. Design system integration: applies team design system automatically. 'When a design is ready to build, Claude packages everything into a handoff bundle that you can pass to Claude Code with a single instruction.' Export: URL, folder, Canva, PDF, PPTX, HTML.

April 14, 2026 - Routines in Claude Code: new workflow automation capabilities.

Artifacts: now support MCP and persistent storage.

Agent Capabilities API: code execution tool, MCP connector, Files API, 1-hour prompt cache for cross-session context.

Claude 4 models: Opus 4, Sonnet 4 released.
competitors.content_hash:
Claude.ai/Anthropic 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 17, 2026 - Claude Design (Anthropic Labs, research preview):
Powered by Claude Op

changes.description: Claude Design（4月17日）：视觉设计工具，完成设计后可「一条指令移交给 Claude Code」，实现 Design→Code 跨工具 handoff
changes.evidence: 「When a design is ready to build, Claude packages everything into a handoff bundle that you can pass to Claude Code with a single instruction」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2 + #4：Anthropic 在自家产品间实现跨工具 artifact handoff（bundle 而非 snapshot），触碰 meee2 跨工具 live link 概念——目前局限于 Anthropic 生态

changes.description: Artifacts 支持 MCP + persistent storage，跨 session 持久化
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Artifact 从临时 snapshot 进化为持久存储，向「live link 不是 snapshot」方向演进

changes.description: Routines in Claude Code（4月14日）：新增 workflow 自动化触发能力
changes.evidence: 「Introducing routines in Claude Code is mentioned as an April 14, 2026 update, enabling new workflow capabilities」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Routines 为 Claude Code 带来定期 / 触发式执行能力，偏向 peripheral automation 方向

key_findings: Claude Design (4月17日)：视觉设计→Claude Code 一键 handoff，Anthropic 在自家生态内建立跨工具 artifact 链路
Artifacts 持久化：从「临时 snapshot」向「跨 session live artifact」演进，触碰 meee2 锚点 #2

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
GitHub Copilot June 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

June 8, 2026 - GitHub Copilot App (technical preview, all existing Copilot subscribers):
Standalone desktop app for working with AI coding agents. 'My Work' dashboard: single view of active sessions, open issues, PRs, background automations across connected repos. Isolated worktrees per session—parallel agents don't interfere. Agent Merge: monitors CI checks, tracks required reviewers, addresses failing checks, waits for merge conditions, drives PR to green and merge; developer decides which steps Copilot is allowed to perform. Canvases: 'work surfaces shared between humans and agents. A canvas can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state. Agents update the canvas as work progresses, and developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface.'

June 4, 2026 - Agent Tasks REST API (public preview, Pro/Pro+/Max):
Programmatically start and track Copilot cloud agent tasks in its own development environment.

/every command: schedules recurring prompts and background tasks. Cloud automations: run on schedule, respond to GitHub events, open issues, post comments.
competitors.content_hash:
GitHub Copilot June 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

June 8, 2026 - GitHub Copilot App (technical preview, all existing Copilot subscribers):

changes.description: GitHub Copilot App 独立桌面客户端（6月8日）：含「My Work」总览、并行 agent 隔离 worktree、Canvases 人机共享工作面
changes.evidence: 「Canvases: work surfaces shared between humans and agents... Agents update the canvas as work progresses, and developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 + #3：「人机共享工作面」agent 更新、人类审批重定向——meee2 人/AI session 共用同一 canvas 的直接实现

changes.description: Agent Merge：AI agent 全程驱动 PR 从提交到合并，自主监控 CI、响应 reviewer
changes.evidence: 「Agent Merge follows a pull request through review and integration. It monitors continuous integration checks, tracks required reviewers, addresses failing checks, and waits for merge conditions to be met」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 全程代理一个完整工作项（PR）从启动到完成

changes.description: Agent Tasks REST API（6月4日）+ /every 命令：编程触发后台 agent，定期运行或响应 GitHub 事件
changes.evidence: 「Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max users can now programmatically start and track Copilot cloud agent tasks... /every command schedules recurring prompts and background tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：定期触发 AI 快 session，类似 meee2 Routine 机制

key_findings: Copilot App Canvases (6月8日)：「人机共享工作面」agent 更新 + 人类审批——直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #1 和 #3，本次报告最重要新增
Agent Merge + Agent Tasks REST API：AI 全程代理 PR 流程，编程式触发后台 agent——GitHub 快速向 meee2 session 模型趋近

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Google Gemini 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Workspace Studio (Google Cloud Next 2026): 'End users can build custom agents in minutes by simply describing what they want to automate in plain language, and Gemini will create it.' No coding required.

Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank: GA. 'Give agents persistent context across interactions.'

Gemini Canvas: GA for all users; in Google Search AI Mode (rolled out March 2026 to all US users). 'Build fully functional personalized apps in Canvas that can use Gemini-powered features, save data between sessions, and share data between multiple users.' Export to Google Docs. Custom web pages, infographics, quizzes, Audio Overviews.

Agent Designer: visual flow canvas for building agent workflows (preview).

Google I/O 2026 / Google Cloud Next 2026: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol announced. AI Studio mobile app. Export projects from AI Studio to Antigravity local development with single click.
competitors.content_hash:
Google Gemini 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Workspace Studio (Google Cloud Next 2026): 'End users can build custom agents in minutes by si

changes.description: Workspace Studio：用自然语言描述直接生成 AI agent workflow，no-code
changes.evidence: 「End users can build custom agents in minutes by simply describing what they want to automate in plain language, and Gemini will create it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive-first 构建——描述行为即生成 flow，与 meee2「flow 从真实行为 emerge」概念重叠

changes.description: Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank GA：agent 跨 interaction 持久化 context
changes.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session 持久化 context，与 meee2「跨 session artifact pull」重叠

changes.description: Gemini Canvas 全量上线：data 跨 session 保存 + 多用户共享，已进入 Google Search AI Mode
changes.evidence: 「Build fully functional personalized apps in Canvas that can use Gemini-powered features, save data between sessions, and share data between multiple users」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：canvas data 跨 session 持久化，但局限于 Gemini 生态

key_findings: Workspace Studio：自然语言描述生成 agent workflow，descriptive-first 构建触碰 meee2 锚点 #3
Agent Engine Sessions GA：跨 session 持久化 context；Gemini Canvas 面向所有用户开放且数据跨用户共享

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Linear 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

March 24, 2026 - Linear Agent public beta: Skills (save reusable workflows from conversations); Automations (trigger agent workflows when issues enter triage). All plans.

April 2026 - MCP support: Linear Agent connects to external tools via MCP.

April 30 - Releases: generate release notes with Linear Agent.

May 14 - Code Intelligence: codebase-aware tasks, diagnose app functionality, design technical specs.

May 27 - Linear Diffs: 'review diffs from any issue with a PR and iterate on further changes with agents.' Native to Linear.

June 4 - Team Documents: every team gets a dedicated page for notes/docs/references. Skills sharing: 'sharing skills with your team so great personal workflows can become shared team process—standardize recurring workflows like writing specs, running weekly planning, or drafting updates.'
competitors.content_hash:
Linear 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

March 24, 2026 - Linear Agent public beta: Skills (save reusable workflows from conversations); Auto

changes.description: Linear Diffs (5月27日)：在 Linear 中原生 review PR diff，用 agent 迭代修改
changes.evidence: 「Linear Diffs makes reviewing code a fast and fluid experience native to Linear, allowing you to review diffs from any issue with a PR and iterate on further changes with agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull（从 GitHub PR 拉进 Linear context），coding agent 在 PM 工具内直接操作

changes.description: Skills 团队共享（6月4日）：个人 agent 工作流可共享为团队标准流程
changes.evidence: 「Skills let you save reusable instructions for Linear Agent, with support for sharing skills with your team so great personal workflows can become shared team process」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 owner 的 workflow artifact pull——个人 session 积累的 skill 被其他 session / 人复用

key_findings: Linear Agent 公测（3月）：技能沉淀 + 自动化触发，6月新增团队技能共享，个人 workflow 升级为团队标准流程
Linear Diffs（5月）：在 PM 层直接 review + agent 迭代代码，跨工具 context 集成深度持续加强

AI Generate in Workflow Builder: generative AI as native step in every Slack workflow—write prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates response.

Salesforce Canvas: bi-directional sync fields from Salesforce data in canvas sections.

Developer platform: single `slack create agent` command, bring-your-own-LLM (Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI).

competitors.content_hash:

March 2026: MCP server launched—access and search notes directly from within Claude and Codex.

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Raycast 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Presets renamed to Agents—reusable across chats, update config once applies everywhere.

Team sharing: 'Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization, making it easier to give everyone access to the same setups.'

Memory: 'added Memory so chats remember context about you... an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time.' Profile: jot down role/tools/communication style used across conversations.

Skills: custom instructions for recurring tasks. Skills and AI Extensions loaded dynamically when relevant.

OpenRouter support. MCP HTTP Servers (experimental). AI Extensions for Ollama.
competitors.content_hash:
Raycast 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Presets renamed to Agents—reusable across chats, update config once applies everywhere.

Team shari

changes.description: Presets→Agents + 团队 Agent 共享：跨对话复用，组织级统一分发 AI agent 配置
changes.evidence: 「Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization, making it easier to give everyone access to the same setups and work more consistently」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：menu bar 工具层实现跨 owner 的 agent 共享，触碰 meee2 peripheral 层的团队协作维度

changes.description: Memory + Profile：跨对话持久化个人 context，自动构建记忆摘要
changes.evidence: 「Added Memory so chats remember context about you and feel more personal... Memory, an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session 的个人 context 持久化，历史沉淀为可复用的 context

key_findings: Agents + Memory + Skills：Raycast 在 menu bar / peripheral 层构建跨 session 持久化 context + 团队 agent 共享
推断：Raycast 在 peripheral 层的演化方向与 meee2 最相近，但核心定位（launcher vs. session 协议）仍不同

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Replit 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Agent 4 launch:
Design Canvas: 'an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools.' 'Select Generate variants on any element to see new options in context and apply the one you like directly.' Multi-user collaboration in single shared project (fork-and-merge gone). Agent 4's parallel task system resolves merge conflicts automatically 90% of time. Plan-while-building: plan and build concurrently. Multi-artifact: mobile apps, web apps, landing pages, decks, videos in same project with shared context. Enterprise integrations: create Linear tickets, answer questions in Notion, analyze Excel data.
competitors.content_hash:
Replit 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

Agent 4 launch:
Design Canvas: 'an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direc

changes.description: Agent 4 Design Canvas：无限画板支持所有 artifact 类型 + 直接操作 + Generate variants
changes.evidence: 「Design Canvas—an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools. Users can select 'Generate variants' on any element to see new options in context」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：直接操作元素 + 生成变体——Descriptive-first 交互模式

changes.description: 多用户共享 project + AI 自动解 merge conflict（90%）+ 跨工具企业集成
changes.evidence: 「teammates now work together in a single shared project with agent-assisted merging. Agent 4's parallel task system enables AI to resolve merge conflicts automatically 90% of the time」

key_findings: Agent 4 Design Canvas：infinite board + 所有 artifact 类型 + generate variants，Descriptive-first 交互
多用户单 project 协作 + enterprise 跨工具集成（Linear / Notion / Excel）

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Superwhisper 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 2026 (v2.13.0): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. New Modes design. 'Integrates seamlessly with agentic coding apps like Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, and Codex, allowing users to drive coding agents without touching the keyboard.'

February 2026 (Windows): New Gemini and Grok models, new OpenAI and Anthropic models.

Enterprise tier launched.
competitors.content_hash:
Superwhisper 2026 updates via WebSearch (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文):

April 2026 (v2.13.0): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. New Modes design.

changes.description: Claude Code / Open Code agent 集成（4月 v2.13.0）：语音驱动 coding agent，不触摸键盘操作 Cursor / Claude Code / Amp / Codex
changes.evidence: 「integrated Claude Code and Open Code agents for enhanced AI assistance... drive coding agents without touching the keyboard」

key_findings: 语音→coding agent 集成：Superwhisper 成为 Cursor / Claude Code 等 AI 编辑器的语音输入层，无结构重叠威胁

alerts.headline: ACP 协议：「agent 的 LSP」成为开放行业标准，JetBrains / Google / GitHub 已采用——meee2 锚点 #1 在 coding 域被 commoditize
alerts.evidence: 「ACP is an open protocol (Apache 2.0, JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout) that standardizes communication between editors and coding agents — the LSP equivalent for AI agents. ACP has been adopted by JetBrains, Google, GitHub, and 25+ agents」
alerts.action_suggestion: 研究 ACP 协议规范，评估 meee2 的「人+AI 同协议」是否应兼容 ACP 或在 ACP 之上建立差异化（非 coding 场景、跨工具而非局限 IDE）。若 ACP 扩展到非 coding 领域，meee2 的 session 协议需明确与之区分或互操作。

alerts.headline: Workspace Agents（4月22日）：企业团队共享的云端 AI agent，离线时持续工作——meee2「AI 快 session」被 OpenAI 以 Codex 产品化上线
alerts.evidence: 「shared agents that handle complex tasks and long-running workflows, all while operating within the permissions and controls set by their organization... run in the cloud, so they can keep working even when you're not」
alerts.action_suggestion: OpenAI 已将「后台运行 AI session + 组织权限治理」产品化。meee2 需明确与 Workspace Agents 的差异：(1) 非 coding 场景；(2) 人+AI 同构协议（而非主从关系）；(3) 不切焦点的 peripheral 层（meee2 菜单栏 vs. ChatGPT 网页/桌面）。

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents + Canvas Design Mode：云端 AI 跨 repo 并行 + 直接指向元素指导编辑——同时触碰 meee2 锚点 #1 和 #3
alerts.evidence: 「Cloud Agents — agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel」＋「Select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits. Instead of describing the change in text, you can point to it」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor 的 canvas + cloud agent 模型仍局限于 coding IDE 场景。meee2 应强调跨工具（不仅 IDE）、人与 AI 平等的 session 协议，以及 descriptive canvas 在任意工作类型（非只代码）的适用性。

alerts.headline: Copilot App Canvases（6月8日）：「人机共享工作面」agent 更新 + 人类审批——meee2 锚点 #1 + #3 在 GitHub 生态落地
alerts.evidence: 「Canvases: work surfaces shared between humans and agents... Agents update the canvas as work progresses, and developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
alerts.action_suggestion: GitHub Copilot App Canvas 概念与 meee2 高度重叠，但目前局限于 GitHub 生态（issue / PR / CI）。持续观察是否向通用工作 canvas 扩展（非 coding 项目、跨工具 canvas）。同时关注 Agent Merge 模式是否延伸到非 PR 的通用任务场景。

alerts.headline: Claude Design 跨工具 handoff（4月）+ Artifacts 持久化：Anthropic 在自家生态内建立 Design→Code 链路，artifacts 从 snapshot 进化为持久存储
alerts.evidence: 「When a design is ready to build, Claude packages everything into a handoff bundle that you can pass to Claude Code with a single instruction」＋「Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage」
alerts.action_suggestion: Anthropic 正在自家生态内实现跨工具 live link，但目前局限于 Anthropic 工具链（Claude Design→Claude Code）。meee2 的差异化应在于跨平台、跨 owner、跨任意工具的 artifact live link，而非单一生态内的 handoff。关注 Anthropic 是否将此 handoff 机制开放为协议层。
